---
id: join-subdevice
title: "开启网关子设备添加模式"
description: "调用本接口，指定一个 Zigbee 网关进入子设备添加模式。"
sidebar_label: "开启网关子设备添加模式"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: i18n/zh/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"开启网关子设备添加模式"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/gateways/subdevices/join"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



调用本接口，指定一个 Zigbee 网关进入子设备添加模式。

:::tip
在开始之前，请确保 Zigbee 子设备已处于配网模式。
:::


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["gatewayId","commandCode"],"properties":{"gatewayId":{"type":"string","description":"网关设备 ID。"},"commandCode":{"type":"string","enum":["APIEnableSubdeviceJoining"],"description":"入网命令编码：\n- `APIEnableSubdeviceJoining`: 标准 Zigbee 设备入网（例如通过按键触发入网模式）。\n"},"data":{"type":"object","description":"入网参数（JSON 对象），根据不同的 commandCode，需传入的参数说明如下：\n- `APIEnableSubdeviceJoining`: 无需传入此字段。\n"}},"title":"SubdeviceJoinRequest"},"examples":{"zigbeeJoin":{"summary":"标准 Zigbee 设备入网（如三击入网）","value":{"gatewayId":"gateway001","commandCode":"APIEnableSubdeviceJoining"}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"成功","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"消息类型"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"接口版本","example":"v1"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"消息 表示成功"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"提示信息"}},"title":"BaseResponse"}],"example":{"type":"SubdeviceJoinResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-000000000011","code":0,"message":"success"},"title":"SubdeviceJoinResponse"},"examples":{"success":{"value":{"type":"SubdeviceJoinResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"2df2f431-a58d-4fdb-b39c-4f0d29e7ecf9","code":0,"message":"success"}},"fail":{"value":{"type":"SubdeviceJoinResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"2df2f431-a58d-4fdb-b39c-4f0d29e7ecfa","code":2201,"message":"invalid
